title: Pronoun y: there / to it
subtitle: Replace places and à-phrases smoothly.
duolingoBridge: A2 French starts using pronouns to avoid repeating long phrases.
overview: Knowledge point 1: y can replace a place: à Paris → y.
Knowledge point 2: y can replace some à + thing phrases.

sections.title: Y map
rows: I am thinking about this problem.

items.fr: Tu vas au café ? Oui, j’y vais.
items.en: Are you going to the café? Yes, I am going there.

items.fr: J’habite à Wellington et j’y travaille.
items.en: I live in Wellington and I work there.
items.es: Vivo en Wellington y trabajo allí.

items.fr: Nous allons à la gare et nous y attendons Marie.
items.en: We are going to the station and we are waiting for Marie there.
items.es: Vamos a la estación y esperamos allí a Marie.

items.fr: Tu penses à ton voyage ? Oui, j’y pense.
items.en: Are you thinking about your trip? Yes, I am thinking about it.
items.es: ¿Piensas en tu viaje? Sí, pienso en él.

items.en: I am not going there tomorrow.
